welcome.title:
Send money home,
instantly.
welcome.subtitle: Fast, secure transfers to 30+ African countries. Built for the diaspora.
welcome.signIn: Already have an account? Sign in

slide1.title: Send to 30+ countries
slide1.description: Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Senegal, and more — we cover the whole continent.

slide2.title: Arrive in minutes
slide2.description: Most transfers complete in under 5 minutes via mobile money or bank deposit.

slide3.title: Trusted & regulated
slide3.description: Licensed and compliant. Your money is safe with us.

phone.title: Enter your phone number
phone.subtitle: We'll send you a verification code
phone.disclaimer: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: You're almost there
register.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

intro.title: Verify your identity
intro.subtitle: We're required by law to verify your identity before you can send money
intro.whyExplained: Identity verification protects you and complies with financial regulations. Your data is encrypted and secure.

instructions.title: For best results:
instructions.flat: Place ID on a flat surface

selfie.title: Take a selfie
selfie.subtitle: Position your face within the frame
selfie.livenessInstructions: Follow the on-screen prompts to complete the liveness check

address.title: Proof of address
address.subtitle: Upload a document showing your current address
address.requirements: Must show your name and current address, dated within 3 months

pending.title: Verification in progress
pending.subtitle: We're reviewing your documents. This usually takes 2-5 minutes.
pending.checkBack: We'll notify you when it's done

approved.title: Verified!
approved.subtitle: Your identity has been verified. You can now send money.

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.
errors.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is {{maxSize}}MB.
errors.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported file format. Please use JPG or PNG.
errors.cameraPermissionDenied: Camera access denied. Please enable it in Settings.
errors.galleryPermissionDenied: Photo library access denied. Please enable it in Settings.
errors.pushPermissionDenied: Notifications are disabled. Enable them in Settings to get transfer updates.
errors.offlineQueued: You're offline. Your transfer will be sent automatically when you reconnect.
errors.syncFailed: Failed to sync pending transfers. Tap to retry.
